title: Update Router::prune_neighbors_at, maintain, and related methods for Trickle-safe policy
description: Inject or use default TrickleSafeLivenessPolicy in prune_neighbors_at. Eviction only after policy confirmation AND >10s. Keep topology change detection and trickle.reset exactly as-is. Update maintain to pass policy. Ensure monotonic clock.
close_reason: Updated Router::prune_neighbors_at, maintain, prune_neighbors, NeighborTable::prune, prune_with_removed, is_likely_alive to use TrickleSafeLivenessPolicy with generic param for eviction logic. Ensured monotonic clock via observe_now. Updated docs, reexported trait in lib.rs. Tests pass. Topology change detection and trickle.reset preserved exactly.
